title: Black Fifteen
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Black}} {{SpaceStation |image= |name=Black Fifteen |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]''[[Before the Storm]]'' |line= |model=[[Type II Orbital Repair Yard]] |type=Orbital repair yard |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |diameter= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement=*[[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] of varying class *[[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Intimidator'']] *[[Rakehell (Sorannan-class)|''EX-F'']] *''[[Redoubtable]]'' *Several medium [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]] |bays=Nine |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity=At least nine large [[Starship/Legends|starships]] |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |region=*[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] *[[The Negs]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of the grid square K-10 portion of [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] in [[the Negs]]. |sector=[[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] |system=[[N'zoth system/Legends|N'zoth system]] |coordinates=K-10{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |xyz= |orbited=[[N'zoth]] |distance= |routes= |role= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
[[Duskhan League]] |constructed= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |owners= |namedcrew= |captains=[[Jian Paret]] |registry= |aliases= |population= |interest= |services= |sectors= |modules= }} {{Quote|You see, the quality ratings for Black Fifteen had nothing to do with the engineering staff or the foremen and everything to do with the Yevethan guildsmen. They've got the gift of understanding how a thing is put together practically on a first glance. Then they draw it from memory the next day, and by the third they've figured out everything that's wrong about it and started making you a better one.|[[Davith Sconn]] to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|''[[Shield of Lies]]''}} '''Black Fifteen''' was the code-designation of a [[Type II Orbital Repair Yard]] assigned to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy's]] [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]] and placed in orbit above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[N'zoth]] in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. The [[Shipyard/Legends|facility]] was renowned as the finest conscript facility in the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]], in which the Koornacht Cluster lay; this was due to the work of the native [[Yevetha]], who were adept at the construction and modification of space [[Starship/Legends|vessels]]. The yard was [[Yevethan Uprising|taken over]] by the Yevetha in 4 ABY, shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and the facility's staff and [[Officer/Legends|officers]] were captured. ==History== Built after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] subjugation of N'zoth, Black-15 was attached to the planetary occupation force under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Jian Paret]], and manned by a Yevethan work force that outnumbered their Imperial overseers nine to one. As with all Type II yards, the facility possessed nine shipways arranged in a massive square formation. It was not capable of constructing [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnoughts]], but it was possible to dock these massive ships at some of the facility's outward berths, and the [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Intimidator'']] was moored here after she was transferred to Koornacht from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] for the final stages of her fitting-out. Black-15 was primarily designated for the construction and fitting-out of new warships, as opposed to repair operations. However, the reputation of the Yevethan technicians was such that [[Captain/Legends|captains]] in the local [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Group]] who needed repairs done on their ships eagerly seized any available docking slots, and by the time N'zoth was lost to the Empire, eight months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], a sizable proportion of the work being done at Black-15 involved the rebuilding and reconstruction of old or damaged ships. At this point, however, the guardship [[Harridan (starship)|''Harridan'']] was withdrawn to serve at the front, and Commander Paret received his orders to pull out of the system. Seizing the moment, the Yevethan underground, led by [[Nil Spaar]], launched a coup and killed or enslaved the remaining Imperial forces. They seized the warships present and captured the shipyards, and, forming a government known as the [[Duskhan League]], put Black-15 to use upgrading and maintaining the captured ships of the Black Fleet, and constructing new warships to the old Imperial designs. ==Appearances== *''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}} *[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]] *''[[Shield of Lies]]'' *[[Shield of Lies (abridged audiobook)|''Shield of Lies'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Galaxy at War]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Negro 15 }} [[Category:Galactic Empire shipyards]] [[Category:N'zoth system locations]] [[Category:Space stations in the Core Worlds]] [[Category:Space stations in the Negs]] [[Category:Type II Orbital Repair Yards]]
